title: inula arenaria
intro: Inula arenaria, also known as golden samphire or sea lavender, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its saponin and flavonoid content. Inula arenaria is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems.
